text:
to locate the information you need, please contact ResDAC.
| SAS Name | Variable Name | 
|---|---|
| BENE_ID | Encrypted CCW Beneficiary ID | 
| DOB | Beneficiary Date of Birth | 
| SEX | Beneficiary Sex | 
| EPSD_BGN_DT | Episode Beginning Date | 
| EPSD_END_DT | Episode Ending Date | 
| DOD | Beneficiary Date of Death | 
| CNCR_TYPE_ASGNED | OCM-Assigned Cancer Type | 
| PRFMNC_PRD | OCM 6 Month Performance Period | 
| RPTD_TO_RGSTRY | Participant Reported Episode to OCM Registry | 
|
